subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-05-30
subcodes.first_line: One day in the course of conversation Haji Siyyid Javad said to me: 'I was a good friend of Haji Siyyid Ali, the maternal uncle of the Báb.
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @business; financial; property matters, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power of the Manifestation of God
